payload.answer: The Sam note remains ambiguous. Cloud escalation is currently disabled. I need a clarification to resolve the ambiguity before updating memory or taking further action.

details: Stored as low-confidence note with ambiguity preserved.

repair_options: Provide concrete clarification about Sam note (who, what, why), and whether cloud escalation should be re-enabled.
